item.title: This Burrito Was Huge!
item.description: Watch the creation and challenge of a massive burrito. Packed with layers of ingredients, this oversized meal is both impressive and delicious.

media:content.media:title: This Burrito Was Huge!
media:content.media:description: Watch the creation and challenge of a massive burrito. Packed with layers of ingredients, this oversized meal is both impressive and delicious.

item.title: Fastest I’ve Ever Eaten
item.description: Watch a speed-eating attempt as someone tackles a meal at record pace. See the strategy, intensity, and results of eating faster than ever before.

media:content.media:title: Fastest I’ve Ever Eaten
media:content.media:description: Watch a speed-eating attempt as someone tackles a meal at record pace. See the strategy, intensity, and results of eating faster than ever before.

item.title: Twin's BBQ & Grill Knights Challenge
item.description: Watch the Twin's BBQ & Grill team take on the Farmington Knights Challenge. A fun, competitive cook-off featuring barbecue skills and tasty creations.

media:content.media:title: Twin's BBQ & Grill Knights Challenge
media:content.media:description: Watch the Twin's BBQ & Grill team take on the Farmington Knights Challenge. A fun, competitive cook-off featuring barbecue skills and tasty creations.

item.title: 4 Minutes on the Clock: Game On
item.description: A high-pressure challenge begins with just 4 minutes on the clock. Watch the intensity and strategy unfold as the team races against time to complete the task.

media:content.media:title: 4 Minutes on the Clock: Game On
media:content.media:description: A high-pressure challenge begins with just 4 minutes on the clock. Watch the intensity and strategy unfold as the team races against time to complete the task.

item.title: Record Broken: Harder Than It Looks
item.description: Watch a new record get set in a challenging task. See the effort, skill, and surprising difficulty behind breaking the previous best.

media:content.media:title: Record Broken: Harder Than It Looks
media:content.media:description: Watch a new record get set in a challenging task. See the effort, skill, and surprising difficulty behind breaking the previous best.

item.title: Wendy’s Speed Challenge: 3 Burgers in 90 Sec
item.description: Watch a fast-eating challenge at Wendy’s as someone attempts to eat three burgers in under 1 minute 30 seconds. Intense, fun, and fast-paced action.

media:content.media:title: Wendy’s Speed Challenge: 3 Burgers in 90 Sec
media:content.media:description: Watch a fast-eating challenge at Wendy’s as someone attempts to eat three burgers in under 1 minute 30 seconds. Intense, fun, and fast-paced action.

item.title: Mango Meets Chocolate
item.description: Watch the delicious combination of fresh mango and rich chocolate come together. A simple, sweet treat perfect for dessert lovers.

media:content.media:title: Mango Meets Chocolate
media:content.media:description: Watch the delicious combination of fresh mango and rich chocolate come together. A simple, sweet treat perfect for dessert lovers.

item.title: Undefeated BBQ Challenge at Smoked to the Bone
item.description: Watch an attempt to complete the undefeated BBQ challenge at Smoked to the Bone. Intense, mouthwatering, and full of smoky flavors.

media:content.media:title: Undefeated BBQ Challenge at Smoked to the Bone
media:content.media:description: Watch an attempt to complete the undefeated BBQ challenge at Smoked to the Bone. Intense, mouthwatering, and full of smoky flavors.
